name: Skyline Sentinel
oracle_text:
Alt-Mode (Interceptor) — {1}: Until your next turn, ~'s base power and toughness become 1/2 and it gains flying. Activate only as a sorcery.
Vigilance
flavor_text: Scanning the horizon for Decepticon movement, even when the clouds roll in.
design_notes: This card is designed to support the WU 'Skyline Patrol' archetype. By using {W}{U}, it provides both the defensive stability of White (Vigilance) and the mobility required by the archetype's Alt-Mode mechanic. As an uncommon, it features one complex ability (Alt-Mode) and one simple keyword (Vigilance), staying within the complexity budget for its rarity while serving as a functional piece for players wanting to turn ground units into evasive flyers.
